creator: freebsd-gnats@in-addr.com
text:
Wireshark 1.0.3 has been released.  It contains security related bug fixes.  Announcement at:

http://www.wireshark.org/news/20080903a.html

Security advisory:

http://www.wireshark.org/security/wnpa-sec-2008-05.html

Fix: See attached patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
